assumptions: The page is a report surface and must not use any legacy decision-score fallback on this path.
The transcript list below the matrix is the comparison source; both surfaces must stay in sync for the same condition.
If the canonical v2 data is absent or malformed, throwing a clear error is preferable to silently rendering old scores.
discovery.summary: DomainAnalysisValueDetail condition matrix must use canonical decisionModelV2 only, preserve the visible 1 / 2 / - display and click-through behavior, and fail loudly if canonical v2 data is missing or not renderable.
